meaning: n.(鑽墿绛夌殑)杩囬噺(浣跨敤)
examples: There are rare occasions where you might experience overdosage.
Transient reversible hypotension may occur in cases of accidental overdosage.
We should distinguish atropine overdosage from coma caused by pesticide poisoning.
Patients who retain even a minor amount of natural insulin production are far less likely to go blind or fall into a coma from insulin overdosage than those who lose all their islet cells.
